title: AccelR Function
parameters:
paramNumber	Integer expression which can have the
		 following values:

1: acceleration
		 specification value

2: deceleration
		 specification value
see_also:
Returns specified tool rotation acceleration value.

AccelR Statement

AccelR Function
examples:
Real currAccelR, currDecelR
' Get current accel and decel
currAccelR = AccelR(1)
currDecelR = AccelR(2)
